decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Enchantress engine to draw cards and generate mana, while controlling the board with enchantments like Parallax Wave and Opalescence. The deck aims to set up a combo with Replenish to bring back a full board of enchantments, overwhelming the opponent. The use of Serra's Sanctum and Wild Growth allows for explosive mana generation, while cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing provide flexibility and protection. Overall, the deck focuses on creating a powerful enchantment-based engine to win the game through a combo finish.

This deck revolves around the synergy between enchantress cards and powerful enchantments. By using cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards whenever enchantments are played, the deck aims to quickly accumulate resources and overwhelm the opponent. The main win condition is to combo off with cards like Opalescence and Replenish to create a massive board presence and close out the game. The deck also includes cards like Parallax Wave and Sterling Grove for disruption and protection.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying a horde of Goblin creatures to overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat out larger creatures like Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Ringleader, while also using powerful tribal synergies with cards like Goblin Warchief. By combining aggressive creatures with disruptive cards like Gempalm Incinerator and sneaky plays with Sneak Attack, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they can mount a defense. With a focus on speed and aggression, the Goblins deck seeks to win the game quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on using the combo of Replenish and Opalescence to quickly overwhelm opponents with a board full of powerful enchantments. By utilizing cards like Attunement and Intuition to search for key pieces, along with Decree of Silence for control, the deck aims to set up a win condition that is difficult for opponents to stop. With a mix of card draw, removal, and powerful combo potential, this deck can quickly establish dominance and secure victory in a variety of matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to combo off using Ill-Gotten Gains and Brain Freeze to mill your opponent's library. The deck includes cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly, allowing you to cast multiple spells in one turn. Intuition helps you search for key combo pieces, while cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual provide additional mana acceleration. Tormod's Crypt is included as graveyard hate, and cards like Arcane Denial and Chain of Vapor serve as disruption against your opponent's strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by denying the opponent resources and maintaining board presence through land and standstill effects. This deck aims to stall the game and gradually draw advantages through card advantage spells like Fact or Fiction and Impulse, while managing threats with Counterspell and removal spells. The deck also includes land destruction elements with Dust Bowl and Mishra's Factory to disrupt opponent's mana base. The strategy revolves around creating a lock on the game and outvalue the opponent in the long run.

The deck focuses on fast and aggressive gameplay, utilizing cheap, efficient creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. With a low mana curve and a high density of burn spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent early on and finish the game before the opponent can stabilize. It also includes utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Barbarian Ring to provide additional reach and flexibility in the late game. The key strategy is to apply constant pressure and close out the game as quickly as possible.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle or Chain of Vapor to create a powerful threat while preventing the opponent from responding effectively with countermagic. The deck also includes card draw spells like Gush and Opt to find the necessary combo pieces quickly, as well as disruption spells like Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo. Overall, the goal is to quickly deploy the Dreadnought and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a win.

Mono Black Aggro utilizes low-cost creatures and hand disruption spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to pressure the opponent early and continuously while maintaining card advantage with Graveborn Muse. The inclusion of efficient removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict helps to clear the way for the aggressive creatures to attack. The deck also includes some utility lands like Wasteland and Mishra's Factory to further disrupt the opponent's mana base and creatures.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Intuition, then using Replenish to bring them back onto the battlefield to create a powerful board presence. Cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave work together to control the board and overwhelm the opponent with a constant stream of threats. The deck also includes cards like Abeyance and Decree of Silence to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own combo. Overall, the deck aims to set up a powerful combo quickly and efficiently to dominate the game.

This deck revolves around utilizing enchantresses and enchantment cards to create a powerful combo strategy. By drawing cards and ramping up mana with cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence, the deck aims to control the board with enchantments like Elephant Grass and Parallax Wave. With cards like Opalescence and Replenish, the deck can turn its enchantments into powerful threats while also protecting itself with cards like Solitary Confinement. Overall, the deck focuses on creating a strong enchantment-based engine to overwhelm opponents and secure victory.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful engine with Enchantress cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards and ramp up mana with cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. It utilizes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing for protection and disruption, while using cards like Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement to stall the game and set up for a big finish with cards like Opalescence and Replenish. The key strategy is to create a lock-down board state while setting up for a game-winning combo.

Utilizing disruptive spells, card draw, and cheap counterspells to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo, which allows for a one-mana 12/12 creature to hit the battlefield without sacrificing any creatures. The deck aims to control the game by stopping opponent's key plays and disrupting their strategy while setting up for a game-winning turn with the combo. The use of cantrips and card selection helps to find the necessary pieces efficiently, while the threat of the combo keeps opponents on their toes.

Utilizing a combination of creatures, spells, and lands, this deck focuses on manipulating the board and controlling the game. By using cards like Opposition and Survival of the Fittest, the player can ensure they have the right creatures in play at all times to maintain control. The deck also features powerful creatures like Masticore and Triskelion, along with support cards like Wirewood Symbiote and Fyndhorn Elves to help set up the win condition. With a strong mana base including Gaea's Cradle and City of Brass, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents in a grindy game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly play Phyrexian Dreadnought and counter any threats that may prevent its ability from triggering. By using Stifle, Foil, and Counterspell to protect the Dreadnought, the deck aims to create a powerful combo that can win the game in just a few turns. The deck also includes card draw and deck manipulation to help find the necessary pieces for the combo. This deck's strategy is to control the game and set up a game-winning combo with Phyrexian Dreadnought.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive Goblin creatures, using cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief to get them out on the battlefield quickly and efficiently. The deck also includes cards like Goblin Ringleader and Goblin Matron to help maintain a strong board presence and keep the pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes some disruption with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to slow down the opponent's game plan, while also having some removal options with cards like Mogg Fanatic and Gempalm Incinerator.
